case_title: TEGSCO LLC VS. REZA MICHAEL JANNATI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JANNATI, REZA MICHAEL DEFENDANT'S CAR SHALL BE RELEASED TO HIM WITHOUT CHARGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QA. DEFENDANT REZA MICHAEL JANNATI APPEARED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC
